description: 40-record fixture for policy-question extraction and response accuracy testing (TEST-014, Sprint 12C). Covers all 20 supported question keys, multi-question emails, and unknown questions.

records.subject: Birthday dinner — can we bring birthday candles?
records.body: Hi, we'd like to book a private dinner for my husband's 50th birthday on Saturday 4th July for 12 people. Can we bring birthday candles for the cake? Thanks, Sarah

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we bring birthday candles for the cake?

records.subject: Candles at private dining room
records.body: Hello, are candles allowed at the table? We're planning a romantic anniversary dinner for two next Friday. Let me know. Kind regards, James

policy_questions.raw_question: are candles allowed at the table?

records.subject: Corporate dinner — birthday cake question
records.body: Hi there, I'm looking to book a dinner for 20 people on Friday 26th June for our CEO's leaving party. Are we allowed to bring a cake? Can the kitchen cut and serve it? Many thanks, Rachel

policy_questions.raw_question: Are we allowed to bring a cake?

records.subject: Hen party — can we decorate?
records.body: Hey! Looking to book for my bestie's hen party on the 19th July, about 15 ladies. Can we put up some decorations like banners and balloons beforehand? Thanks, Katie

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we put up some decorations like banners and balloons beforehand?
Can we put up some decorations like banners and balloons beforehand?

records.subject: Engagement celebration dinner enquiry
records.body: Hello, we want to celebrate our engagement with family and friends — about 30 people — sometime in mid-July. Would we be permitted to bring floral arrangements to decorate the table? Best, Emma

policy_questions.raw_question: Would we be permitted to bring floral arrangements to decorate the table?

records.subject: Birthday party — external magician
records.body: Hi, looking to book a birthday dinner for 25 guests on 12th July. We'd love to have a close-up magician circulating during the meal. Is it possible to bring an external performer? Thank you, Tom

policy_questions.raw_question: Is it possible to bring an external performer?

records.subject: Company summer party — live singer
records.body: Hello, we're organising our company summer party for around 60 people in late July. We'd like to hire a live singer for the evening. Are external performers or live acts allowed in your private dining space? Regards, Natasha

policy_questions.raw_question: Are external performers or live acts allowed in your private dining space?
Are external performers or live acts allowed in your private dining space?

records.subject: Charity gala dinner — live band enquiry
records.body: Dear Events Team, we're planning a charity gala dinner for 80 guests on Saturday 18th July. We would like a live jazz band to play during the drinks reception and dinner. Is live music permitted? Kind regards, Michael

policy_questions.raw_question: Is live music permitted?

records.subject: Birthday — DJ for after dinner?
records.body: Hi there, my friend is turning 40 on 25th July and we're planning a dinner for 35 people. Is there any chance we could have a DJ after dinner for a bit of a party? Thanks, Lisa

policy_questions.raw_question: Is there any chance we could have a DJ after dinner for a bit of a party?

records.subject: Private party room — DJ question
records.body: Hello, I'm enquiring about booking a room for a 30th birthday dinner on 11th July for 20 guests. Can we bring our own DJ and set up some sound equipment? Best, Dan

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we bring our own DJ and set up some sound equipment?

records.subject: Award ceremony dinner — microphone available?
records.body: Hi, we're planning an awards dinner for 50 people in August. We'll need a microphone for speeches. Do you have a microphone available or would we need to bring our own? Many thanks, Patricia

policy_questions.raw_question: Do you have a microphone available or would we need to bring our own?

records.subject: Product launch dinner — AV setup
records.body: Hello, we're organising a product launch dinner for 40 guests at the end of July. We need a screen and projector for a short presentation. Do you have AV equipment available in the private dining room? Thanks, Oliver

policy_questions.raw_question: Do you have AV equipment available in the private dining room?
Do you have AV equipment available in the private dining room?

records.subject: Business dinner — projector screen question
records.body: Hi, we're looking to book a private dinner for 15 people on 14th July. We'd like to present a slideshow. Is there a projector or screen in the room? Kind regards, Sophie

policy_questions.raw_question: Is there a projector or screen in the room?

records.subject: 50th birthday — how many can the private room hold?
records.body: Hello, we're thinking about booking for a 50th birthday party on 5th July. How many people can you fit in the private dining room? We're expecting around 45 guests. Thanks, Andrew

policy_questions.raw_question: How many people can you fit in the private dining room?

records.subject: Conference dinner — room capacity
records.body: Dear Team, we're hosting a conference dinner in mid-August for approximately 90 delegates. What is the maximum capacity for a seated dinner event? Do you have a fully private space that size? Best wishes, Dr Clarke

policy_questions.raw_question: What is the maximum capacity for a seated dinner event?
Do you have a fully private space that size?

records.subject: Wheelchair access — family dinner
records.body: Hi, we'd like to book a birthday dinner for 10 people on 19th July. One of our guests uses a wheelchair. Is the venue fully wheelchair accessible and is there disabled access to the private dining area? Kind regards, Helen

policy_questions.raw_question: Is the venue fully wheelchair accessible and is there disabled access to the private dining area?

records.subject: Family celebration — children welcome?
records.body: Hello, we're planning a family birthday celebration for about 20 people in late July. We'll have 4 children aged between 5 and 10. Are children welcome in the private dining room? Thank you, Fiona

policy_questions.raw_question: Are children welcome in the private dining room?

records.subject: Birthday lunch — bringing our dog?
records.body: Hi there, we'd love to book a birthday lunch for 6 people on 27th June. One of our party would like to bring a small dog. Are pets allowed in the restaurant? Thanks, Charlotte

policy_questions.raw_question: Are pets allowed in the restaurant?

records.subject: Anniversary dinner — what is the minimum spend?
records.body: Hi, my husband and I would like to book a private dining experience for our 10th anniversary next Saturday for 2 people. What is the minimum spend for the private room? Thank you, Claire

policy_questions.raw_question: What is the minimum spend for the private room?

records.subject: Corporate lunch — minimum spend and room hire fee
records.body: Dear Events Team, we're interested in booking a corporate lunch for 18 people on Thursday 16th July. Could you let us know what the minimum spend is and whether there is a room hire charge? Regards, Mark

policy_questions.raw_question: what the minimum spend is
whether there is a room hire charge

records.subject: Private dinner — room hire costs
records.body: Hello, I'd like to enquire about a private dining room for a business dinner for 10 people in the second week of July. Is there a room hire fee on top of the food and drink spend? Many thanks, Lucy

policy_questions.raw_question: Is there a room hire fee on top of the food and drink spend?

records.subject: Agency booking — service charge query
records.body: Hi, I'm booking on behalf of a client for a dinner for 30 people on 10th July. Could you confirm whether a discretionary service charge is added and what the percentage is? Best, Daniel (Events by Daniel)

policy_questions.raw_question: Could you confirm whether a discretionary service charge is added and what the percentage is?

records.subject: Agency enquiry — commission rates
records.body: Hello, I'm an event planner and I'm organising a gala dinner for a corporate client, around 50 guests, on 22nd August. Do you offer agency commission? If so, what is the commission rate? Thank you, Alicia (Premium Events)

policy_questions.raw_question: Do you offer agency commission? If so, what is the commission rate?

records.subject: Event agency — commission query
records.body: Hi, I represent a luxury events agency. We're looking at several venues for a 100-pax dinner on 15th August. Is a commission payable to agencies for confirmed bookings? Best regards, Victoria (Lux Events Agency)

policy_questions.raw_question: Is a commission payable to agencies for confirmed bookings?

records.subject: Birthday dinner — multiple questions
records.body: Hi! Enquiring about a 30th birthday dinner for 22 people on Saturday 18th July. A few questions: Can we bring a birthday cake and candles? Can we put up some balloons and banners? Is there a minimum spend for the room? Thanks so much, Jessica

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we bring a birthday cake and candles?
Can we bring a birthday cake and candles?
Can we put up some balloons and banners?
Is there a minimum spend for the room?

records.subject: Corporate dinner — AV, microphone and room capacity
records.body: Hello, we're planning a company awards dinner for 75 people on 8th August. We need to know: (1) Is there AV equipment in the private dining room? (2) Is a microphone available for speeches? (3) What is the maximum seated capacity? Many thanks, Graham

policy_questions.raw_question: Is there AV equipment in the private dining room?
Is a microphone available for speeches?
What is the maximum seated capacity?

records.subject: Family celebration — children, disabled access and pets
records.body: Hi, we're celebrating my parents' golden wedding anniversary on 26th July — about 35 people. We have elderly guests in wheelchairs and children aged 3–8. We're also hoping to bring a guide dog. Could you let us know: (1) Is disabled access available? (2) Are children welcome? (3) Are assistance dogs permitted? Thank you, Robert

policy_questions.raw_question: Is disabled access available?
Are children welcome?
Are assistance dogs permitted?

records.subject: Agency booking — commission and service charge
records.body: Dear Events Team, I'm enquiring about availability on 3rd August for a high-end dinner for 40 guests. I'm booking on behalf of my agency. Please confirm: (1) whether you pay agency commission, and (2) whether a service charge is applied to the final bill. Best, Andrea (Prestige Dining Agency)

policy_questions.raw_question: whether you pay agency commission
whether a service charge is applied to the final bill

records.subject: Hen do dinner — DJ and decorations
records.body: Hey, planning a hen do dinner for 18 girls on 11th July. Can we bring a DJ for after the meal? And can we decorate the room with our own props and photo booth? Thanks, Gemma

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we bring a DJ for after the meal?
can we decorate the room with our own props and photo booth?

records.subject: Corporate lunch — room hire, minimum spend and service charge
records.body: Hello, we'd like to book a private lunch for 14 people on 22nd July. Before we proceed, could you tell us: (1) Is there a room hire charge? (2) What is the minimum food and drink spend? (3) Is a service charge included in the pricing? Kind regards, Natasha

policy_questions.raw_question: Is there a room hire charge?
What is the minimum food and drink spend?
Is a service charge included in the pricing?

records.subject: Wedding anniversary — flowers and candles
records.body: Hello, my wife and I are celebrating our 25th anniversary on 29th July and would like to book a private dining experience for 8 family members. Can we arrange flowers on the table ourselves? And are table candles allowed? Thank you, Philip

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we arrange flowers on the table ourselves?
are table candles allowed?

records.subject: Live music at charity gala
records.body: Dear Team, we're organising a charity fundraising gala dinner for 120 guests on 7th August. We would like a string quartet during the drinks reception. Is live background music permitted? Thanks, Caroline

policy_questions.raw_question: Is live background music permitted?

records.subject: Birthday — private room available?
records.body: Hi, I'd like to book a surprise birthday dinner for 16 people on 24th July. Do you have a fully private dining room that could accommodate this size? We don't want to be seated in the main restaurant. Thanks, Simon

policy_questions.raw_question: Do you have a fully private dining room that could accommodate this size?

records.subject: Unknown policy — bespoke request
records.body: Hello, we're planning a dinner for 30 people on 2nd August. We'd like to arrange for a professional photographer to be present throughout the meal. Is this something that can be accommodated? Many thanks, Rachel

policy_questions.raw_question: We'd like to arrange for a professional photographer to be present throughout the meal. Is this something that can be accommodated?

records.subject: Unusual request — bespoke entertainment
records.body: Hi there, looking to book a birthday dinner for 40 people on 1st August. We'd like to set up an immersive theatre experience as a surprise for the guest of honour. Is that type of entertainment possible to accommodate? Thanks, Josh

policy_questions.raw_question: We'd like to set up an immersive theatre experience as a surprise for the guest of honour. Is that type of entertainment possible to accommodate?

records.subject: Simple birthday dinner enquiry — no policy questions
records.body: Hi, I'd like to book a birthday dinner for 8 people on Saturday 18th July. We're just looking for a nice meal with no special requirements. Could you let me know if you have availability? Thank you, Amy

records.subject: Corporate dinner — no special requests
records.body: Dear Events Team, we'd like to book a private dinner for 20 people on Thursday 23rd July. Standard set menu will be fine. No special requirements. Could you confirm availability? Best regards, David

records.subject: Full event package — external performer, AV, decorations and costs
records.body: Hello, we're organising a 60th birthday celebration dinner for 55 people on Saturday 15th August. We want to make it very special and have several questions: (1) Can we bring an external comedian or speaker? (2) Is there a screen and projector for a video tribute? (3) Can we bring our own balloons and flower arrangements? (4) Is there a room hire fee? (5) What is the minimum spend per head? Thank you, Catherine

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we bring an external comedian or speaker?
Is there a screen and projector for a video tribute?
Can we bring our own balloons and flower arrangements?
Can we bring our own balloons and flower arrangements?
Is there a room hire fee?
What is the minimum spend per head?

records.subject: Stag dinner — bring our own drinks?
records.body: Hi, we're planning a stag dinner for 14 people on 17th July. We'd like to bring our own whisky selection. Do you allow guests to bring their own spirits or drinks? Is there a corkage charge? Cheers, Ben

policy_questions.raw_question: Do you allow guests to bring their own spirits or drinks? Is there a corkage charge?

records.subject: Agency booking — full commercial terms
records.body: Dear Team, I'm enquiring on behalf of a client for a dinner for 45 guests on 29th August. As we are a booking agency, please confirm: (1) Do you offer agency commission and at what rate? (2) Is there a discretionary service charge and is it mandatory? (3) Is there a room hire fee separate to the food and drink minimum? Best, Francesca (EventCo Agency)

policy_questions.raw_question: Do you offer agency commission and at what rate?
Is there a discretionary service charge and is it mandatory?
Is there a room hire fee separate to the food and drink minimum?
